generated_description: An adversary executed a specialized tool via PowerShell to perform Kerberos authentication using a stolen NTLM hash for a target user, requesting a Ticket Granting Ticket (TGT) from the domain controller over port 88. generated_description: Adversaries executed a credential access tool with elevated privileges to request a Kerberos Ticket Granting Ticket (TGT) for a specified user, authenticating with a provided NTLM hash. The tool then leveraged this TGT to launch a new process with network-only credentials, enabling network authentication using the acquired ticket. This activity involved direct memory access to critical system processes like LSASS and winlogon.exe, indicative of Kerberos ticket manipulation.
